column4: Episodic vertigo (minutes to hours), unilateral sensorineural hearing loss, tinnitus, aural fullness

column4: Persistent ringing/buzzing/hissing in ears; may cause sleep disturbance, anxiety, concentration issues

column4: Sore throat, odynophagia, fever, pharyngeal erythema; mostly viral

column4: Greasy yellowish scales on scalp/face/nasolabial folds, itching, erythema, dandruff

column4: Erythema, vesicles, weeping, pruritus at site of contact (allergic) or irritant exposure; clear borders

column4: Well-circumscribed patches of non-scarring hair loss; exclamation mark hairs at patch margins; nail pitting

column4: Lower abdominal pain, fever, cervical motion tenderness, mucopurulent discharge, dyspareunia
